attributes.action: Provide MenB vaccines for free to all those born before 2015
attributes.additional_details: Start a rollout of free MenB jabs for all those born before 2015, with a focus on young people and teenagers- no one should be financially barred from receiving treatment, anf we deserve to have this national failing fixed.
attributes.background: As seen with the devastating outbreak in Kent, there has been a national failing to fully protect the health of young people. To have the jab as an adult, many are having to go private and pay around 220 pounds, and not everyone can afford that

rejection.details:
You may wish to sign this petition, which calls for similar action: "Make meningitis vaccination available for free to all" https://petition.parliament.uk/petitions/764682

Or you may be interested in this petition: "Offer MenB vaccine to under 22s born before 2015" https://petition.parliament.uk/petitions/764623
